description_long: This is a pair of vintage-style boxing gloves, suspended together by two thin black cords. The gloves are made of dark brown leather, with a smooth, slightly glossy finish and visible stitching along the seams. One glove features a lace-up closure on the front, adding to the classic aesthetic, while the other glove is partially obscured but appears to be of similar construction. The gloves are slightly creased and rounded, indicating a soft, padded interior typical of boxing gloves. The overall shape is bulbous at the knuckles, tapering toward the wrist, and the cuffs are open, revealing the hollow interior. These gloves would be commonly found in urban gyms, sports clubs, or as decorative items in garages or recreational spaces.
description: A pair of dark brown, vintage-style leather boxing gloves with lace-up closure, suspended by black cords. The gloves have a smooth, slightly glossy finish and visible stitching.
description_view_0: Front view showing both gloves, with the left glove's lace-up closure and rounded knuckle area clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth, curved exterior of the gloves and the open cuffs facing outward.
description_view_2: Top-down view showing the open cuffs and the way the gloves hang together, with the lace-up detail partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear angled view displaying the back and sides of both gloves, with the laces and stitching details visible.
